name: @hauptsache.net/clickup-mcp
description: Search, create, and retrieve tasks and documents, add comments, and track time through natural language commands.

tools.name: getTaskById
tools.description: Get a ClickUp task with images and comments by ID.

tools.name: createTask
tools.description: Create a new task in a specific list with markdown support.

tools.name: updateTask
tools.description: Update task name, description, status, priority, dates, tags, assignees.

tools.name: deleteTask
tools.description: Move a task to trash (requires user confirmation).

tools.name: searchTasks
tools.description: Search tasks by name, content, assignees with fuzzy matching.

tools.name: searchSpaces
tools.description: Search spaces/projects with complete tree structure.

tools.name: addComment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task with markdown support.

tools.name: getTaskComments
tools.description: Get all comments on a task.

tools.name: getListInfo
tools.description: Get list details including statuses and description.

tools.name: getTimeEntries
tools.description: Get time entries for tasks or users.

tools.name: createTimeEntry
tools.description: Book time on a task.

tools.name: startTimeEntry
tools.description: Start a timer on a task.

tools.name: readDocument
tools.description: Read ClickUp documents and pages.

tools.name: createDocumentOrPage
tools.description: Create documents or add pages.

tools.name: getGoals
tools.description: List workspace goals with progress tracking.

tools.name: createGoal
tools.description: Create a new goal with key results.

tools.name: getWorkspaceViews
tools.description: List views (list, board, calendar, gantt, etc.).

tools.name: getViewTasks
tools.description: Get tasks filtered by view criteria.

tools.name: getWebhooks
tools.description: List configured webhooks.

tools.name: createWebhook
tools.description: Create webhook for event notifications.

tools.name: getUserGroups
tools.description: List user groups/teams.

tools.name: bulkUpdateTasks
tools.description: Batch update multiple tasks at once.

tools.name: getSpaceTags
tools.description: Get all tags in a space.

tools.name: addTagToTask
tools.description: Apply a tag to a task.

clickup_api_key.title: ClickUp API Key
clickup_api_key.description: Your ClickUp API key. Get it from Profile → Settings → Apps → API Token

clickup_team_id.title: ClickUp Team ID
clickup_team_id.description: Your ClickUp Team ID (the 7–10 digit number in the URL when in settings)

clickup_primary_language.title: Primary Language
clickup_primary_language.description: Primary language hint for search optimization (e.g., 'de' for German, 'en' for English)
